title: Chapter 188
content:
Chapter 188: Sophie the Menace

Sophie’s chest thrust forward dramatically, those massive breasts nearly spilling out completely as she looked over her shoulder at him with a small, knowing smile.

"You’re not even breaking a sweat with that weight, Stan," she purred, her voice dripping with admiration, Sophie was curious, but she didn’t press him for answers.

She knew enough about fitness and the human body to understand that no steroid, no performance enhancer, no amount of "juice" could make someone casually lift that kind of weight.

That much, she was absolutely certain of.

Yet Stan was standing right in front of her, handling it as though it weighed almost nothing at all.

As she moved back into Downward Dog, she made it deliberately slower, rolling her spine vertebra by vertebra, letting her ass sway from side to side.

The motion made her cheeks bounce and jiggle enticingly, the seam of her pants disappearing between her plump folds.

Stan’s breathing grew heavier, not just from the lifts, but from the way her body moved like pure liquid sex in front of him. He wanted nothing more than to drop the barbell, walk over, and smack that fat, juicy ass until it rippled.

Stan didn’t know how he managed it, but somehow he endured the temptation until he finished his set.

Honestly, it felt like a miracle.

After his set, Stan walked over, wiping sweat from his brow. "How are you feeling, baby?"

Sophie slowed the treadmill to a walk, breathing a little heavier, her skin glowing. "Good... but I think I need my personal trainer now."

Stan smiled, that warm, loving smile that always made her heart flutter. He stepped onto the treadmill behind her, reaching around to lower the speed slightly. His chest pressed lightly against her back as he placed his hands on her waist.

"Alright, let’s do some guided cardio. First, proper walking form." His voice was low and intimate near her ear. "Chest up... shoulders relaxed... and engage your core."

His hands slid down to her hips, gently guiding her movement. Sophie leaned back into him slightly, enjoying the closeness.

"Mmm, I like this kind of guidance," she murmured.

Stan chuckled softly. "You’re doing so well. God, you look so sexy when you’re working out. That ass in these leggings should be illegal."

He gave her hips a light, affectionate squeeze as she continued walking. After a minute, he had her step off and move to the yoga mat.

"Let’s do some bodyweight stuff. Squats first." Stan positioned himself behind her again. "Feet shoulder-width... now drop down slowly."

As Sophie lowered into the squat, Stan’s hands stayed on her hips, guiding her depth. When she pushed back up, her ass brushed against his crotch. He didn’t move away.

"Perfect form," he praised, voice husky. "Again. Nice and slow for me."

Sophie obeyed, deliberately pressing back against him on the way up.

"Like this?" she asked innocently, though her tone was full of mischief.

"Exactly like that," Stan groaned softly. "You’re teasing me on purpose, aren’t you?"

"Maybe..." She laughed breathlessly. "But you love it. I can feel how much you love it."

He pulled her upright after another rep and wrapped his arms around her from behind, kissing the side of her neck where a light sheen of sweat had formed. "I do. I love every inch of you. The way you move, the way you trust me to guide you... it makes me want to skip the rest of the workout and take you right here."

Sophie turned in his arms, her hands resting on his chest. "Then keep guiding me, coach. What’s next?"

Stan’s eyes darkened with desire, but his touch remained loving. "Glute bridges. Lie down."

She got into position on the mat. Stan knelt between her legs, hands on her thighs. "Lift your hips... higher, baby. Squeeze at the top."

As Sophie raised her hips, he slid his hands under her ass, supporting and caressing her. His thumbs traced the sensitive crease where her thighs met her cheeks.

"Feel that burn?" he asked, voice warm.

"Yes... but your hands feel better," she moaned softly, holding the bridge longer than necessary.

Stan leaned down and kissed her inner thigh. "You’re so strong and so fucking beautiful. I’m proud of you, Sophie. I love watching you push yourself."

They continued like this for the next half hour, intimate guidance mixed with genuine workout moments.

Stan showed her some light dumbbell rows while standing behind her, his body pressed close as he corrected her posture, hands gliding along her back and sides.

During a plank hold, he lay beside her, whispering encouragement and occasionally running his hand along her spine.

"You know," Sophie said during a water break, sitting on his lap on the weight bench, "I didn’t expect gym time with you to feel this romantic."

Stan wrapped his arms around her waist, looking into her eyes. "Everything with you feels romantic. Even sweating and breathing hard... I just want to be close to you. I love sharing these little parts of my life with you."

Sophie cupped his face and kissed him tenderly. "I love being here. In your space. Seeing this side of you, strong, focused, but still so gentle with me."

Stan’s hands roamed her back affectionately.

They shared a long, sweet kiss on the bench, hearts racing from both exertion and love.

"Ready for one more round of cardio?" Stan asked, voice playful yet intimate.

"Only if my favorite trainer guides me again," Sophie replied, biting her lip.

He took her back to the treadmill, standing close behind her once more. This time, his hands stayed on her waist the entire time as she walked at a brisk pace, occasionally sliding lower to caress her hips and ass while whispering praises and teasing promises of what he wanted to do to her after they showered.

By the end of the session, both were flushed, sweaty, and buzzing with connection. Stan pulled her into a tight embrace in the middle of the gym, foreheads touching.

"Thank you for coming with me today," he said softly. "This was one of the best workouts I’ve ever had."

Sophie smiled, glowing with happiness. "Best because we did it together. I love you, Stan."

"I love you more," he whispered, kissing her deeply.
